\tzpentry{ID3837}{Be Vector Field Defined By Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3837 introduces Be Vector Field Defined By Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(X_H\) be the Hamiltonian vector field defined by \(\iota_{X_H}\omega = -\mathrm{d}H\)
\]
